test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bench_intersect_overlap (poly Polygon) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE bench_intersect_early_empty (poly Polygon) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bench_intersect_overlap SELECT [[(0., 0.), (toFloat64(100 - number * 0.01), 0.), (toFloat64(100 - number * 0.01), toFloat64(100 - number * 0.01)), (0., toFloat64(100 - number * 0.01)), (0., 0.)]] FROM numbers(10000)
test.query: SELECT groupPolygonIntersection(poly) FROM bench_intersect_overlap FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT groupPolygonIntersection(poly) FROM bench_intersect_early_empty FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
